$jsonSchema.description: Order document capturing the full delivery or pickup transaction including items, delivery info and assigned employee

customerId.description: Reference to the customer who placed the order - required

storeId.description: Reference to the store that fulfills the order - required

items.description: Ordered products with quantity and unit price snapshot - required

name.description: Product name snapshot at time of order

unitPrice.description: Price per unit at time of order

deliveryType.description: Whether the order is home delivery or store pickup - required

deliveryAddress.description: Delivery address (required if deliveryType is delivery)

deliveryEmployeeId.description: Reference to the delivery employee assigned to this order (optional)

status.description: Current status of the order - required

orderedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was placed - required

deliveredAt.description: Timestamp when the order was delivered or picked up (optional)

totalPrice.description: Total price of all items in the order - required

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used by the customer (optional)
